sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Trump Accounts App Built By BNY (NYSE: BK) And Robinhood (NASDAQ: HOOD) Goes Live
feed.summary: The U.S. administration has launched the "Trump Accounts" mobile app, developed by Bank of New York Mellon and Robinhood, to facilitate children's long-term investments. Officially 530A accounts, they provide a $1,000 federal contribution for eligible children born between 2025-2028, with an S&P 500 ETF as the default investment. The initiative aims to provide young Americans with a financial stake in the future, with companies like Intel and Nvidia matching contributions.

feed.title: Molecular Partners AG to Present MP0712 Phase 1/2a Study Findings at 2026 ASCO and SNMMI Annual Meetings
feed.summary: Molecular Partners AG announced it will present trial-in-progress posters for its Phase 1/2a study of MP0712, a targeted alpha radiotherapy candidate, at the 2026 ASCO and SNMMI Annual Meetings. MP0712 targets the DLL3 protein in small cell lung cancer and other neuroendocrine tumors, with initial clinical data expected later this year. The company is collaborating with Orano Med on this Radio-DARPin platform drug, which aims to evaluate safety and determine a recommended Phase 2 dose.

feed.title: ArcelorMittal Nippon Steel India gets First PM-SETU SIP approval
feed.summary: ArcelorMittal Nippon Steel India (AM/NS India) has received the first Strategic Investment Plan (SIP) approval under the Indian government’s PM-SETU scheme, marking a key step in the national vocational training initiative. This approval, granted for the Visakhapatnam ITI Cluster in Andhra Pradesh, establishes Andhra Pradesh as the first state to operationalize an industry partnership under PM-SETU and sets a precedent for industry involvement in upgrading governmental Industrial Training Institutes. The PM-SETU program, with a budget of ₹60,000 crore, aims to modernize 1,000 ITIs nationwide and align training with industry needs.

feed.title: WASHINGTON TRUST Co Takes $19.03 Million Position in Marsh & McLennan Companies, Inc. $MRSH

The company recently reported Q1 earnings of $3.29 per share, exceeding estimates, and analysts currently rate the stock a "Hold" with an average price target of $203.56.

feed.title: New targeted lung cancer drug MP0712 reaches patients in US trial
feed.summary: Molecular Partners (NASDAQ: MOLN) announced that its DLL3-targeting radio-DARPin MP0712 is now dosing patients in a US Phase 1/2a trial for small cell lung cancer and other neuroendocrine tumors. The company will present trial-in-progress posters at ASCO 2026 and SNMMI 2026, with initial clinical data expected in 2026. This therapy relies on the high expression of DLL3 in over 85% of SCLC tumors and leverages a diagnostic isotope, 203Pb, for early imaging and dosimetry data, supporting its continued clinical development.

feed.title: Incyte blood cancer drug combo reduces disease-progression risk but with high side-effect rate By Reuters
feed.summary: Incyte's Monjuvi, when used in a multi-drug regimen including chemotherapy for aggressive non-Hodgkin lymphoma, significantly reduced the risk of disease progression, relapse, or death by 25% compared to standard treatment alone. However, this benefit came with a higher rate of severe side effects and patient discontinuations due to adverse events. The company plans to seek expanded approval for this combination as an initial treatment for newly diagnosed patients, potentially doubling the eligible patient population.

feed.title: Incyte drug combo cuts risk of high-risk lymphoma worsening by 25%
feed.summary: Incyte announced positive results from its Phase 3 frontMIND trial, showing that the combination of tafasitamab and lenalidomide with R-CHOP significantly prolonged progression-free survival in patients with previously untreated high-risk diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (DLBCL) and high-grade B-cell lymphoma (HGBL). This drug combination reduced the risk of disease progression or death by 25% compared to R-CHOP alone across crucial subgroups. The findings support potential global regulatory applications for this new treatment option, addressing a critical unmet need in patients with aggressive forms of lymphoma.

feed.title: ASCO: Pfizer one-ups J&J with Talzenna combo's broad castration-sensitive prostate cancer win
feed.summary: Pfizer's Talzenna, in combination with Xtandi, has achieved a significant phase 3 win in metastatic castration-sensitive prostate cancer (mCSPC), demonstrating a 52% reduction in the risk of radiographic progression or death across various homologous recombination repair (HRR) gene alterations. This positions Pfizer's combination favorably against Johnson & Johnson's Akeega, which received a narrower FDA approval restricted to BRCA2 mutations. The broad efficacy of Talzenna plus Xtandi, even in non-BRCA-mutated patients, suggests a potential shift in clinical practice for men with HRR gene-mutated mCSPC.

feed.title: Applied Materials Deepens EPIC Center Ties To Chipmakers With SCREEN Deal
feed.summary: Applied Materials has added SCREEN Semiconductor Solutions to its EPIC Center, focusing on next-generation chip manufacturing for AI and advanced devices. This collaboration integrates SCREEN's wafer cleaning and surface preparation tools into Applied Materials' R&D environment, enabling co-optimized process solutions. The move aims to embed Applied Materials' tools deeper into chipmakers' process flows, potentially making their combined offerings harder for competitors to displace.
